specialistChecks.detail: LPR Blue and White ba82a3e7-8e28-4046-b122-0b80cebec163 v2 verified with hosted asset bytes.
4 Views and 2 Forms deployed; full verification passed after workflow integration and reconciliation.
Published runtime version 1; native Start/Task integration and effective assignee verified.

endToEndScenarios.name: LPR.Submit and decide a leave request
endToEndScenarios.detail: Ordinary Runtime routes returned HTTP 302 authentication redirects. Authenticated create/start/worklist/action/final-status correlation was not executed.

errata.description: The LPR Blue and White Style Profile required manual creation after the local authoring operation could not load App_GlobalResources.
errata.impact: Resolved: the checked-in profile and hosted CSS contract now verify successfully.
errata.remediation: Completed manually in K2 Designer and verified through the Style Profile utility.

errata.description: The manager approval destination is the environment-bound placeholder K2:TRIALS\Administrator.
errata.impact: All leave approvals route to the deployment identity instead of the production manager or manager group.
errata.remediation: Replace workflow.userTask.assignees in workflow-manifest.json with the intended explicit K2 user, group, or role before production rollout.

errata.description: Authenticated Runtime rendering, lookup CRUD, workflow start, Worklist task action, and final status correlation were not run.
errata.impact: No browser-level evidence exists yet for the end-to-end process.
errata.remediation: Sign in to the ordinary Runtime Form URL, create a request, approve or reject the resulting task, and correlate LeaveRequestId, workflow instance, task action, and final Status.

errata.description: Two supported builder resume attempts failed because SQL Server reported insufficient system memory in resource pool 'default'. The host had approximately 813 MB free physical memory when checked.
errata.impact: Resolved after the user restarted services; the final builder deployment and verification gate passed.
errata.remediation: Completed: services restarted and deployment resumed successfully.

errata.description: After the exit-0 final Builder gate and successful in-run verification, secondary handoff metadata helpers emitted contradictory missing-artifact messages.
errata.impact: No deployment checkpoint failed; the live GUIDs, versions, Form states, workflow publication, and integration were already verified in the authoritative builder run.
errata.remediation: Use the recorded in-run deployment evidence. Run targeted inspection only if later drift or a missing live artifact is reported.

rollbackNotes: Use k2build cleanup -Manifest solution-manifest.json -Confirm to remove manifest-owned workflow, Forms, Views, SmartObjects, and the SQL Service Instance in reverse dependency order. The database is preserved unless -DropDatabase is explicitly authorized.

LPR Blue and White is now consumed by the deployed Forms. Remove those Forms before attempting Style Profile cleanup; the utility deliberately preserves the IIS virtual directory and physical directory.

The source directory is currently uncommitted. The recorded sourceRevision identifies the repository base commit, while the complete solution source is the untracked examples/leave-request-process directory.
